message:
style: rustfmt over fr-conformance after nightly bump

Mechanical rustfmt diff applied automatically after `rustup update
nightly` (toolchain went from 17584a181 to 37d85e592, both 1.97).
The new rustfmt has slightly tighter wrapping rules for tuple
literals — same semantics, no behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
